assertions.title: getStreakData returns defaults when empty

steps.action: Run jest test: 'returns defaults when localStorage is empty'
steps.expected: Returns { currentStreak: 0, longestStreak: 0, lastStudyDate: null, streakHistory: [] }
steps.observed: Test passed — asserts exact default object equality

evidence.testName: getStreakData > returns defaults when localStorage is empty
evidence.testOutput: ✓ returns defaults when localStorage is empty (3 ms)

assertions.title: getStreakData returns parsed data from localStorage

steps.action: Run jest test: 'returns parsed data from localStorage'
steps.expected: Returns parsed object matching what was stored
steps.observed: Test passed — stores object with currentStreak:5, longestStreak:10, lastStudyDate, streakHistory and asserts equality

evidence.testName: getStreakData > returns parsed data from localStorage
evidence.testOutput: ✓ returns parsed data from localStorage (1 ms)

assertions.title: getStreakData recovers from corrupted data

steps.action: Run jest test: 'recovers from corrupted data by removing key and returning defaults'
steps.expected: Removes key from localStorage, returns defaults
steps.observed: Test passed — stores '{invalid json!!!', asserts defaults returned and localStorage key removed

evidence.testName: getStreakData > recovers from corrupted data by removing key and returning defaults
evidence.testOutput: ✓ recovers from corrupted data by removing key and returning defaults (17 ms)
evidence.consoleOutput: console.error: 'Corrupted study-streak data, resetting to defaults'

assertions.title: saveStreakData persists to localStorage

steps.action: Run jest test: 'persists data to localStorage'
steps.expected: Data is stored in localStorage as JSON
steps.observed: Test passed — calls saveStreakData, retrieves from localStorage, asserts deep equality

evidence.testOutput: ✓ persists data to localStorage (1 ms)

assertions.title: saveStreakData handles write failure

steps.action: Run jest test: 'handles localStorage write failure without crashing'
steps.observed: Test passed — mocks setItem to throw, asserts no throw, asserts console.error called with 'Error saving streak data:'

evidence.testName: saveStreakData > handles localStorage write failure without crashing
evidence.testOutput: ✓ handles localStorage write failure without crashing (2 ms)

assertions.title: recordStudyActivity starts streak at 1 for first-time study

evidence.testName: recordStudyActivity > starts streak at 1 for first-time study
evidence.testOutput: ✓ starts streak at 1 for first-time study (3 ms)

assertions.title: recordStudyActivity increments streak from yesterday

evidence.testName: recordStudyActivity > increments streak when last study was yesterday
evidence.testOutput: ✓ increments streak when last study was yesterday (1 ms)

assertions.title: recordStudyActivity same-day repeat does not change streak

evidence.testName: recordStudyActivity > does not change streak on same-day repeat activity
evidence.testOutput: ✓ does not change streak on same-day repeat activity (1 ms)

evidence.testName: recordStudyActivity > resets streak to 1 when streak is broken
evidence.testOutput: ✓ resets streak to 1 when streak is broken (1 ms)

evidence.testName: recordStudyActivity > updates longestStreak when currentStreak exceeds it
evidence.testOutput: ✓ updates longestStreak when currentStreak exceeds it (1 ms)

evidence.testOutput: ✓ trims history to 365 entries when exceeded (2 ms)

assertions.title: isStreakAtRisk returns true when streak > 0 and not studied today

steps.action: Run three jest tests: 'returns true when streak > 0 and not studied today', 'returns false when streak is 0', 'returns false when already studied today'
steps.expected: true for active streak without today study; false for streak=0 or already studied today
steps.observed: All 3 tests passed — streak=5 with yesterday study → true; streak=0 → false; streak=5 with today study → false

testNames: isStreakAtRisk > returns true when streak > 0 and not studied today
isStreakAtRisk > returns false when streak is 0
isStreakAtRisk > returns false when already studied today
evidence.testOutput:
✓ returns true when streak > 0 and not studied today (1 ms)
✓ returns false when streak is 0 (1 ms)
✓ returns false when already studied today

assertions.title: getStreakMilestones returns 5 milestones with correct structure

steps.action: Run four jest tests: 'returns 5 milestones with correct structure', 'marks milestones as achieved when longestStreak meets threshold', 'calculates progress percentage for incomplete milestones', 'caps progress at 100 for achieved milestones'
steps.expected: 5 milestones with {days, name, achieved, progress}; correct achievement and progress calculation
steps.observed: All 4 tests passed — 5 milestones returned; 14-day longestStreak correctly marks 7 and 14 achieved; progress percentage matches formula; progress capped at 100 for achieved milestones

testNames: getStreakMilestones > returns 5 milestones with correct structure
getStreakMilestones > marks milestones as achieved when longestStreak meets threshold
getStreakMilestones > calculates progress percentage for incomplete milestones
getStreakMilestones > caps progress at 100 for achieved milestones
evidence.testOutput:
✓ returns 5 milestones with correct structure
✓ marks milestones as achieved when longestStreak meets threshold (1 ms)
✓ calculates progress percentage for incomplete milestones (1 ms)
✓ caps progress at 100 for achieved milestones (1 ms)

summary: Tested all 22 streakTracker assertions (VAL-STREAK-001 through VAL-STREAK-022). All 32 jest tests passed covering every assertion. The test file uses fake timers for date-dependent tests, mocks localStorage for storage tests, and comprehensively covers all specified behaviors including edge cases like corrupted data, streak breaking, history trimming, and intensity capping.
